vlan.tip: Manage network segmentation with VLANs to isolate traffic and enhance security.
vlan.name: Name
vlan.ipv4RangesTip: Configure IPv4 address ranges for this network.
vlan.routerIpTip: The IP address of the router on this network.
vlan.apIsolationTip: You can isolate your network's client devices into a separate network area. These devices cannot communicate with other devices on the network.
vlan.ap_isolation_tip: You can isolate your network's client devices into a separate network area. These devices cannot communicate with other devices on the network.
vlan.dhcpTip: Enable DHCP to automatically assign IP addresses to devices on this network.
vlan.addressReservationTip: When you specify a reserved IP address for a LAN client, the client will always receive the same IP address when it requests an IP address from router's DHCP server. You can assign reserved IP addresses to computers or servers that require permanent IP settings.
vlan.addressReservationNote: Note: Configured clients have to reconnect the router to activate.
vlan.block_wan_subnets_tip: If this function is enabled, the guest network will not be able to access the upper network and the network segment where the upper network is located.
vlan.iot_network_unavailable: IoT network is currently unavailable because
vlan.guest_network_unavailable: Guest network is currently unavailable because
vlan.subnet_tip: You can set subnet within IPv4 private address ranges: 192.168.0.0/16, 172.16.0.0/12, 10.0.0.0/8
vlan.confirmDeleteAll: Are you sure you want to delete all the address reservations?
vlan.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the reserved address entry?
vlan.hostnameTips: 2-63 characters. Only letters, digits or hyphens are allowed. Must not start or end with a hyphen, nor consist solely of digits.
vlan.confirmDeleteSubnet: Are you sure you want to delete this network?
vlan.lprTips: Multiple printer LPR ports can be filled.
